mapper.sql: id, icao24, callsign, longitude, latitude, baro_altitude, velocity, heading, on_ground, origin_country, record_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM flight_track ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT MIN(id) AS id, NULL AS icao24, MIN(DATE_FORMAT( FROM_UNIXTIME(FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(record_time) / 600) * 600), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00' )) AS callsign, NULL AS longitude, NULL AS latitude, NULL AS baro_altitude, COUNT(*) AS velocity, NULL AS heading, NULL AS on_ground, NULL AS origin_country, MIN(FROM_UNIXTIME(FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(record_time) / 600) * 600)) AS record_time FROM flight_track WHERE record_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(record_time) / 600) ORDER BY FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(record_time) / 600)
SELECT FROM flight_track WHERE callsign = #{callsign} ORDER BY record_time DESC
SELECT FROM flight_track WHERE icao24 = #{icao24} ORDER BY record_time DESC
